channel.title: Awesome Mac - Recent App Additions
channel.description: Recently added macOS apps tracked from awesome-mac.

item.title: Aurora Editor
item.category: Reading and Writing Tools / Text Editors
item.description: Category: Reading and Writing Tools / Text Editors App: Aurora Editor Description: Lightweight Code Editor (IDE) for macOS. Website: https://auroraeditor.com/ Commit: Improve RSS HTML compatibility Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/8a32bca6144317b8a01f758a5bc22517664d854b
item.content:encoded:
Category: Reading and Writing Tools / Text Editors
App: Aurora Editor
Description: Lightweight Code Editor (IDE) for macOS.
Website: https://auroraeditor.com/
Commit: Improve RSS HTML compatibility
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/8a32bca6144317b8a01f758a5bc22517664d854b

item.title: Archimedes
item.category: Reading and Writing Tools / Markdown Tools [![Awesome List][awesome-list Icon]](https://github.com/BubuAnabelas/awesome-markdown#tools)
item.description: Category: Reading and Writing Tools / Markdown Tools [![Awesome List][awesome-list Icon]](https://github.com/BubuAnabelas/awesome-markdown#tools) App: Archimedes Description: Native macOS Markdown editor geared toward mathematical writing with inline LaTeX support. Website: https://furnacecreek.org/archimedes/ Commit: Improve RSS HTML compatibility Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/8a32bca6144317b8a01f758a5bc22517664d854b
item.content:encoded:
Category: Reading and Writing Tools / Markdown Tools [![Awesome List][awesome-list Icon]](https://github.com/BubuAnabelas/awesome-markdown#tools)

Description: Native macOS Markdown editor geared toward mathematical writing with inline LaTeX support.
Website: https://furnacecreek.org/archimedes/
Commit: Improve RSS HTML compatibility
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/8a32bca6144317b8a01f758a5bc22517664d854b
